column1: Deposit required: 50% upon acceptance of estimate
Progress payment: 40% upon completion of concrete pour
Final payment: 10% upon project completion and walkthrough
1. This estimate is valid for 30 days from the date above.
2. Pricing is based on current material costs and may adjust if costs change significantly.
3. Any changes to the scope of work may result in additional charges.
4. Client is responsible for obtaining all necessary permits unless otherwise agreed.
5. Work area must be accessible for concrete trucks and equipment delivery.
6. Underground utilities must be marked by client or utility company prior to work.
7. Existing driveway removal includes hauling; disposal fees included in estimate.
8. Concrete curing time is 7 days minimum; no vehicle traffic for 7-10 days.
9. Minor surface cracking is normal and not a defect in workmanship.
10. Warranty: 1 year on workmanship; materials per manufacturer warranty.
11. Grade and drainage slope per standard practice (1/8 inch per foot minimum).
12. Sealer should be reapplied every 2-3 years for best results.
